title: Sum of Two Integers
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads two integers separated by a space and prints their sum.
input_format: Two integers separated by a space.
output_format: Print a single integer representing their sum.

title: Area of a Circle
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads the radius of a circle and prints its area using ? = 3.14159. Display the answer rounded to two decimal places.
input_format: One positive real number representing the radius.
output_format: Print the area rounded to two decimal places.

title: Largest of Two Numbers
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads two integers and prints the larger number. If both are equal, print either value.
input_format: Two integers separated by a space.

title: Print Numbers from 1 to N
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads an integer N and prints all integers from 1 to N separated by spaces.
output_format: Numbers from 1 to N separated by spaces.

title: Factorial of a Number
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads a non-negative integer and prints its factorial.

title: Prime Number Check
problem_statement: Write a Python program that defines a function to determine whether a given integer is prime. Print "Prime" if the number is prime; otherwise print "Not Prime".

title: Largest Element in a List
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads a list of integers and prints the largest element.
input_format: First line: integer N. Second line: N integers separated by spaces.

title: Count Vowels in a String
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads a string and prints the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u). Count both uppercase and lowercase vowels.
output_format: Print the total number of vowels.

title: Word Frequency Counter
problem_statement: Write a Python program that reads a sentence and prints the frequency of each word while preserving the order of first appearance.
output_format: Print each word followed by its frequency, one per line.

title: Fibonacci Using Recursion
problem_statement: Write a Python program that computes the nth Fibonacci number using recursion. Assume F(0)=0 and F(1)=1.
